assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: File contains '## Repository Registry' with table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and separator '|---|---|---|---|' but no data rows below.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: File contains '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: File contains '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md states: 'No Serena MCP tools were found among the available tools.' and 'None of these match the Serena tool naming pattern (e.g., mcp__serena__*).'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md states: 'No Atlassian MCP tools were found among the available tools. No tools matching patterns such as mcp__atlassian__* or mcp__jira__* were detected.' and 'Fell back to manual entry for Jira configuration fields.'

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md states: 'Prompted the user about continuing without code intelligence. User chose to continue without setting up Serena.' changes-log.md also confirms: 'Informed the user that no Serena instances were discovered and asked whether to continue without code intelligence or set up Serena first.'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md confirms: 'User was asked whether to enable security triage configuration. User declined. No Security Configuration section was added.' The claude-md-result.md file does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section.
